memoryArtifacts.headline: Thomas II de COUCY (1180-1253)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Thomas II de Coucy né en 1180/1191, mort après 1252, seigneur de Vervins, Fontaine et Landouzy. Fils de Raoul Ier, seigneur de Coucy, et d'Alix II de Dreux.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins於1183年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆波福斯時，他的父親Raoul Ier de Coucy49歲，母親Alix de Dreux27歲。他於1224年12月之前與Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1253年8月24日在法國皮卡迪艾斯維文斯享年70歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯拉 布泰爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins于1183年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆波福斯时，他的父亲Raoul Ier de Coucy49岁，母亲Alix de Dreux27岁。他于1224年12月之前与Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1253年8月24日在法国皮卡迪艾斯維文斯享年70岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪艾斯拉 布泰爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins was born in 1183, in Boves, Somme, Picardie, France, his father, Raoul Ier de Coucy, was 49 and his mother, Alix de Dreux, was 27. He married Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY before December 1224, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 24 August 1253, in Vervins, Aisne, Picardie, France, at the age of 70, and was buried in La Bouteille, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins est né en 1183, à Boves, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Raoul Ier de Coucy, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Alix de Dreux, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY avant décembre 1224, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 août 1253, à Vervins, Aisne, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à La Bouteille, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins 1183 in Boves, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul Ier de Coucy 49 und seine Mutter Alix de Dreux 27. Er hat vor Dezember 1224 in Frankreich Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. August 1253 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Vervins, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in La Bouteille, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins è nato il nel 1183 nel Boves, Somme, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Raoul Ier de Coucy, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Alix de Dreux, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY prima del dicembre 1224, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 agosto 1253, nel Vervins, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a La Bouteille, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas II de Coucy-Vervinsが1183年にフランスピカーディソンメボベスで生まれた時，父Raoul Ier de Coucyは49歳，母Alix de Dreuxは27歳であった。1224年12月以前にフランスでMahaut DE RETHEL VITRYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1253年8月24日にフランスピカーディエイスンバーヴィンスで70歳で死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンラ ボウテイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins(이)가 1183년 프랑스 피카디 솜 보브스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul Ier de Coucy(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Dreux(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1224년 12월 이전 프랑스에서 Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1253년 8월 24일 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 베르빈스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 라 부테이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins nasceu em 1183, em Boves, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Raoul Ier de Coucy, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Dreux, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY antes dezembro de 1224, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1253, em Vervins, Aisne, Picardie, França, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em La Bouteille, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins родился в 1183 г. в местности бовесь, сомм, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul Ier de Coucy было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Dreux, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY перед декабрь 1224 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 августа 1253 г. в местности вирвинс, эисн, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности ла боутилл, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas II de Coucy-Vervins nació en 1183, en Boves, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Raoul Ier de Coucy, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Alix de Dreux, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Mahaut DE RETHEL VITRY antes de diciembre de 1224, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1253, en Vervins, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en La Bouteille, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
